CheckTitle: Microsoft Entra Local Administrator Password Solution (LAPS) is enabled
Description: The tenant device registration policy should enable **Microsoft Entra Local Administrator Password Solution (LAPS)** (**localAdminPassword.isEnabled**). LAPS securely manages and rotates the built-in local administrator password on Windows devices and stores it for controlled retrieval.
Risk: Without **LAPS**, local administrator passwords are often static and shared across devices, enabling **lateral movement**: an attacker who recovers one device's local admin password can reuse it across the fleet.

Code.Other:
1. Navigate to the Microsoft Entra admin center at https://entra.microsoft.com/
2. Go to **Identity** > **Devices** > **Device settings**
3. Set **Enable Microsoft Entra Local Administrator Password Solution (LAPS)** to **Yes**
4. Click **Save**

Recommendation.Text: Enable Microsoft Entra LAPS and deploy a matching Intune policy so local administrator passwords are unique per device, rotated automatically, and retrievable only by authorized roles.
